Introduction
    Give Seven Days is a TV movie starring Vicky Yu, Cenzi Xu, and Kiray Xinyao Wang. Two women who live very different lives decide to exchange homes. Ai Lin (Vicky Yu) is poor while Wen Di (Cenzi Xu) is wealthy. But when they are both...
